matches.moment: Rice wins possession high up the pitch; Bellingham plays a disguised reverse pass into Kane's run in the 51st minute — Kane finishes low across Mpasi to break Congo's resolute 5-3-2 block.
Mane equalizes in the 61st minute exploiting the gap behind Castagne; Belgium are rattled for 15 minutes before Doku's 30-metre carry creates Trossard's decisive far-post redirect at the 78th minute.

Pulisic receives McKennie's overlap at the edge of the box in the 67th minute and drives low through a deflection to restore USA's lead — breaking Bosnia's resistance after Demirovic's HT equalizer had unsettled the hosts.

verdict: Today's three matches present a deceptively comfortable-looking slate that conceals genuine variance. England should dispatch DR Congo, but the match will not be the exhibition performance English media anticipate — their 1.88 xG average across the group stage is that of a functional, not exceptional, team, and Congo's consistent defensive record (one goal conceded in every single game, including vs Portugal and Colombia) demands respect. The real story of the day is in Seattle, where Belgium's attacking inconsistency — one goal against Egypt, zero against Iran — collides with Senegal's defensive fragility (six goals surrendered to France and Norway in two games). De Bruyne must impose himself on a physical Senegal midfield to give Belgium the platform they need; if Camara neutralizes him, a 1-1 draw becomes the day's defining result rather than a Belgian advance. In California, the USA-Bosnia game carries the most comfortable probability distribution for the favorite, but Bosnia's remarkable fighting spirit and the wildcard of Alajbegovic's teenage brilliance means the USMNT cannot assume cruise control. Pulisic will need a defining moment, not merely a functional one, to send the hosts into the Round of 16. — The Analyst.

players.name: Harry Kane
players.stat: 3 goals in group stage; xG 0.88 (slight under-conversion suggests correction incoming)
players.watch: Clinical 90-minute hold-up play draws fouls; penalty threat if Congo commit cynically inside the box

players.name: Yoane Wissa
players.stat: 3 goals from 9 shots in tournament; elite conversion rate vs xG
players.watch: Counter-attacking pace against Djed Spence (replacing injured James) on England's right flank

players.name: Kevin De Bruyne
players.stat: 1 goal + tournament-high 6 key passes across group stage; 2025/26 club: 14g/18a
players.watch: Late runs into the right channel behind Senegal's left-sided midfielder — the decisive through-ball zone

players.name: Sadio Mane
players.stat: 1 goal (vs France), consistent starter — fit and full-90 capable at 34
players.watch: Diagonal runs from the left exploiting Belgium's high line; counter-attack trigger after Belgium turnover

players.name: Christian Pulisic
players.stat: 2 goals in tournament; tournament-high xA of 1.54 for USA
players.watch: Left-channel drive cutting inside to right foot — the defining individual action in USA's attacking pattern
